18#ifndef MEDIA_C_SPEC_H_
19#define MEDIA_C_SPEC_H_
20
21#include <stdint.h>
22
23#include "value.h"
24
25#ifdef __cplusplus
26extern "C" {
27#endif
28
38typedef union {
39 float v_float;
40 int32_t v_int;
41 uint32_t v_uint;
42} num_type_t;
43
45typedef struct {
46 num_type_t min;
47 num_type_t max;
48 vtid_t tid;
49} spec_t;
50
58static void spec_print(const spec_t* spec, int (*print_func)(const char*, ...), const char* indent) {
59 (void)print_func("%sSpec: min = ", indent);
60 switch (spec->tid) {
61 case VTID_FLOAT:
62 (void)print_func("%f", (double)spec->min.v_float); // variadic functions implicitly promote float to double
63 break;
64 case VTID_INT32:
65 (void)print_func("%d", spec->min.v_int);
66 break;
67 case VTID_UINT32:
68 (void)print_func("%u", spec->min.v_uint);
69 break;
70 default:
71 (void)print_func("unknown");
72 break;
73 }
74 (void)print_func(", max = ");
75 switch (spec->tid) {
76 case VTID_FLOAT:
77 (void)print_func("%f", (double)spec->max.v_float); // variadic functions implicitly promote float to double
78 break;
79 case VTID_INT32:
80 (void)print_func("%d", spec->max.v_int);
81 break;
82 case VTID_UINT32:
83 (void)print_func("%u", spec->max.v_uint);
84 break;
85 default:
86 (void)print_func("unknown");
87 break;
88 }
89 (void)print_func("\n");
90}
91
92#ifdef __cplusplus
93}
94#endif
95
96#endif // MEDIA_C_SPEC_H_
spec_print
static void spec_print(const spec_t *spec, int(*print_func)(const char *,...), const char *indent)
Print a spec_t range to an output using the provided print function.
